summary: Explains how Cavallo hoof boots benefit mounted police and patrol units, covering traction, concussion reduction, hoof health, field results, and unit discounts.
Details how Cavallo hoof boots help aging and arthritic horses by reducing concussion, improving traction, and distributing pressure to ease joint stiffness and soreness.
Guide to transitioning a horse from metal shoes to barefoot using Cavallo hoof boots, covering benefits, common challenges, soreness, and hoof boot pads.
Step-by-step instructions for sizing and measuring a horse's hooves for Cavallo hoof boots, including measuring after a trim, uploading photos, and special cases like shod or fine-boned horses.
Announcement page introducing the new Cavallo LEB (Long Ear Boot), the first hoof boot designed exclusively for donkeys, now available for purchase.
April 2025 Cavallo newsletter announcing the LEB donkey hoof boot limited first release, a survey contest to win boots, and the March survey winner.
primary_cta: Sign Up for LEB First Run

summary: March 2025 Cavallo newsletter featuring a survey contest, a viral video of a Cavallo-booted horse meeting a wild rhino in South Africa, and other brand updates.
Explains navicular syndrome (caudal heel pain), its subtle symptoms, and how Cavallo hoof boots serve as a dual-purpose riding and therapy boot to restore comfort and mobility.
February 2025 Cavallo newsletter announcing the SPOGA Horse Top Innovations 2025 award won with Consteed for the co-branded diagnostic smart hoof boot.
Cavallo 2024 Year in Review newsletter highlighting brand milestones including Beyonce's Netflix halftime show, the Queen's pony, Texas Tech Masked Rider, and team growth.
Guide to properly cleaning, drying, and storing Cavallo hoof boots to extend their life, including TPU material care and avoiding hydrolysis damage.
Promotional page about Beyonce wearing Cavallo Trek hoof boots on her horse Marshmallow during the Christmas Day NFL Beyonce Bowl halftime show on Netflix.
